devfleet-status.description: Show devfleet runner health, running/pending tasks, and schedules.
devfleet-status.template: Use the devfleet MCP tools to produce a concise devfleet operations status report. Call devfleet_runner_health with include_tasks=true, devfleet_list_tasks for status=running with limit=20, devfleet_list_tasks for status=pending with limit=20, and devfleet_list_schedules with enabled_only=false. Summarize fleet activity, runner image versions, running/stale/pending task counts, each active task, and all schedules. If an MCP call fails, include the exact error and continue. Do not edit files.
